attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
ECPL.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
ECPL.END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE 		END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
ECPL.SS_CODE						SS_CODE,
ECPL.END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL		END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL,
ECPL.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME			EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
NSOLT.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLT, 
(SELECT  SSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,	
		CASE WHEN SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID =-999 				
			THEN COALESCE(NCAT_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999)
			ELSE  
COALESCE(NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999) 
 END 	END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
		CASE WHEN SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID =-999 
			THEN 'ACCOUNT' 
			ELSE 'ACCOUNT_LOCATION' END 				END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
		SUCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME  EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
		NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 				SS_CODE,
		'LINE'                      END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL
	FROM  
		$$STGDB.ST_UO_CCA_SO_END_CUSTOMERS SUCSEC
		INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSOL.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SUCSEC.LINE_ID=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
            ON	( SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )	
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT  NCAT_SOLD
	ON( SUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT  ) 
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
			ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='UO') 
 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SUCSEC.LINE_ID ORDER BY SUCSEC.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME DESC) = 1 ) ECPL
WHERE ECPL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=NSOLT.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY

SELECT 
NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY  SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
ECH.END_CUSTOMER_KEY END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
ECH.END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE 		END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
ECH.SS_CODE						SS_CODE,
ECH.END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL		END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL,
ECH.EDW_CREATE_DATETIME			EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
NSOLT.RU_PARNT_SLS_ORDER_LINE_KEY   
FROM 
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE NSOLT,
( 
SELECT  
 SSO.SALES_ORDER_KEY SALES_ORDER_KEY,	
		CASE WHEN SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID =-999 				
			THEN COALESCE(NCAT_SOLD.CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_KEY,-999)
			ELSE  
COALESCE(NECAL_SHIP.ERP_CUST_ACCOUNT_LOCATION_KEY,-999) 
 END 	END_CUSTOMER_KEY,
		CASE WHEN SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID =-999 
			THEN 'ACCOUNT' 
			ELSE 'ACCOUNT_LOCATION' END 				END_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CODE,
		SUCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME	EDW_CREATE_DATETIME,
		NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE 				SS_CODE,
	'HEADER' 					END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL
		FROM  
		$$STGDB.ST_UO_CCA_SO_END_CUSTOMERS SUCSEC
		INNER JOIN (
			$$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO 
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
			)
ON	( SUCSEC.HEADER_ID=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT	AND	NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
            ON	( SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )	
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT  NCAT_SOLD
	ON( SUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT  ) 
INNER JOIN  $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
			ON(NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME='UO') 
WHERE SUCSEC.LINE_ID IS NULL 
            QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SUCSEC.HEADER_ID ORDER BY SUCSEC.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME DESC) = 1) ECH	
WHERE
NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_KEY=ECH.SALES_ORDER_KEY
AND 
NOT EXISTS 
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SOL_END_CUSTOMER NSECT
	WHERE
	NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY= NSECT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AND
	NSECT.END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL='LINE'
	)
AND NOT EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.WI_SOL_END_CUSTOMER WSEC
	WHERE
	NSOLT.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY=  WSEC.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY AND
	WSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ASSGN_LEVEL='LINE'
	)

SELECT EUCSEC.GES_PK_ID,
 EUCSEC.PHONE_ID,
 EUCSEC.POSTAL_CODE,
 EUCSEC.SALESREP_ID,
 EUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID,
 EUCSEC.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE, 
EUCSEC.CONTACT_ID,
 EUCSEC.COUNTRY, 
EUCSEC.DATA_SOURCE,
 EUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID,
 EUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_VERSION, 
EUCSEC.HEADER_ID,
 EUCSEC.LINE_ID,
 EUCSEC.MARKET_SEGMENT, 
EUCSEC.CDB_DATA_SOURCE, 
EUCSEC.CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME,
 EUCSEC.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME,
 EUCSEC.CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ, 
EUCSEC.BATCH_ID, 
EUCSEC.QUEUE_ID,
 EUCSEC.PROCESS_SET_ID,
  EUCSEC.Q_CREATION_DATE, 
EUCSEC.Q_UPDATE_DATE, 
EUCSEC.ACTION_CODE, 
EUCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME 
FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_UO_CCA_SO_END_CUSTOMERS EUCSEC
WHERE EUCSEC.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI' AND 
NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_UO_CCA_SO_END_CUSTOMERS SUCSEC WHERE SUCSEC.GES_PK_ID = EUCSEC.GES_PK_ID)

SELECT 
SUCSEC.GES_PK_ID, 
SUCSEC.PHONE_ID,
SUCSEC.POSTAL_CODE,
SUCSEC.SALESREP_ID, 
SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, 
SUCSEC.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE, 
SUCSEC.CONTACT_ID,
SUCSEC.COUNTRY, 
SUCSEC.DATA_SOURCE, 
SUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID,
SUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_VERSION, 
SUCSEC.HEADER_ID, 
SUCSEC.LINE_ID, 
SUCSEC.MARKET_SEGMENT, 
SUCSEC.CDB_DATA_SOURCE, 
SUCSEC.CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME,
SUCSEC.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME, 
SUCSEC.CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ, 
SUCSEC.BATCH_ID, 
SUCSEC.QUEUE_ID, 
SUCSEC.PROCESS_SET_ID,
SUCSEC.Q_CREATION_DATE, 
SUCSEC.Q_UPDATE_DATE,
SUCSEC.ACTION_CODE,
SUCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM  
	$$STGDB.ST_UO_CCA_SO_END_CUSTOMERS SUCSEC
	WHERE 
	(NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER_LINE SSOL
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE=SSOL.SS_CODE)
				WHERE COALESCE(SUCSEC.LINE_ID,-9999)=SSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT AND NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO')
	OR 
	NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
				WHERE SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )
	OR 
	NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT  NCAT_SOLD
				WHERE SUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT  ))
	AND LINE_ID IS NOT NULL
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SUCSEC.LINE_ID ORDER BY SUCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 
SUCSEC.GES_PK_ID, 
SUCSEC.PHONE_ID,
SUCSEC.POSTAL_CODE,
SUCSEC.SALESREP_ID, 
SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, 
SUCSEC.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE, 
SUCSEC.CONTACT_ID,
SUCSEC.COUNTRY, 
SUCSEC.DATA_SOURCE, 
SUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID,
SUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_VERSION, 
SUCSEC.HEADER_ID, 
SUCSEC.LINE_ID, 
SUCSEC.MARKET_SEGMENT, 
SUCSEC.CDB_DATA_SOURCE, 
SUCSEC.CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME,
SUCSEC.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME, 
SUCSEC.CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ, 
SUCSEC.BATCH_ID, 
SUCSEC.QUEUE_ID, 
SUCSEC.PROCESS_SET_ID,
SUCSEC.Q_CREATION_DATE, 
SUCSEC.Q_UPDATE_DATE,
SUCSEC.ACTION_CODE,
SUCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM  
	$$STGDB.ST_UO_CCA_SO_END_CUSTOMERS SUCSEC
	WHERE 
	(NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_SALES_ORDER SSO
				INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC_SOL
				ON( NSSC_SOL.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE= SSO.SS_CODE)
				WHERE COALESCE(SUCSEC.HEADER_ID,-9999)=SSO.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT AND NSSC_SOL.GLOBAL_NAME='UO' )
	OR 
	NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_CUST_ACCT_LOC_USE NECAL_SHIP
				WHERE SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID=NECAL_SHIP.SK_SITE_USE_ID_INT )
	OR 
	NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$COMREFVWDB.N_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT  NCAT_SOLD
				WHERE SUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID=NCAT_SOLD.SK_CUSTOMER_ACCOUNT_ID_INT  ) )
	AND LINE_ID IS NULL 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SUCSEC.HEADER_ID ORDER BY SUCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 
SUCSEC.GES_PK_ID, 
SUCSEC.PHONE_ID,
SUCSEC.POSTAL_CODE,
SUCSEC.SALESREP_ID, 
SUCSEC.SHIP_TO_SITE_USE_ID, 
SUCSEC.SPLIT_PERCENTAGE, 
SUCSEC.CONTACT_ID,
SUCSEC.COUNTRY, 
SUCSEC.DATA_SOURCE, 
SUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_ID,
SUCSEC.END_CUSTOMER_VERSION, 
SUCSEC.HEADER_ID, 
SUCSEC.LINE_ID, 
SUCSEC.MARKET_SEGMENT, 
SUCSEC.CDB_DATA_SOURCE, 
SUCSEC.CDB_ENQUEUE_TIME,
SUCSEC.CDB_DEQUEUE_TIME, 
SUCSEC.CDB_ENQUEUE_SEQ, 
SUCSEC.BATCH_ID, 
SUCSEC.QUEUE_ID, 
SUCSEC.PROCESS_SET_ID,
SUCSEC.Q_CREATION_DATE, 
SUCSEC.Q_UPDATE_DATE,
SUCSEC.ACTION_CODE,
SUCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE 
FROM  
	$$STGDB.ST_UO_CCA_SO_END_CUSTOMERS SUCSEC
	WHERE EXISTS
	(SELECT 1 FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_UO_OE_ORDER_LINES_ALL EUOOLA
	WHERE EUOOLA.HEADER_ID=SUCSEC.HEADER_ID)
		AND SUCSEC.LINE_ID IS NULL 
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY SUCSEC.HEADER_ID ORDER BY SUCSEC.CREATE_DATETIME DESC) = 1
